title: Tangy Australian Christmas Pudding Trifle
description: A light and refreshing Australian-inspired dessert featuring Christmas pudding, crunchy elements, and a tangy twist. Perfect for a festive gathering or a summer evening treat.

ingredients.name: Whipped cream
ingredients.notes: Heavy cream, sweetened with a touch of vanilla

instructions: Combine 1 cup heavy cream and 1 tsp vanilla extract in a mixer.
Add 2 cups whipped cream and mix on high until stiff peaks form.
Dissolve 2 tsp unsalted butter and 2 tsp icing sugar in 1 tsp warm water.
Add 1 tsp vanilla extract and whisk until combined.
Soak 1-inch cube Australian Christmas pudding in 1/4 cup tubular biscuits and 2 tsp citrus zest for 5 minutes.
Cut the pudding into small cubes.
Combine the soaked pudding, whipped cream mixture, and dissolved butter mixture in a bowl.
Fold in 1/4 cup shredded coconut, 1/4 cup chopped almonds, and 1 tsp allspice.
Pour 1/4 cup orange marmalade and 1 tsp maple syrup into the mixture and mix until combined.
Transfer the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Melt 1/2 cup dark chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 10-second increments.
Pour the melted chocolate over the top of the trifle and smooth out.
Garnish with 1/4 cup chopped almonds and 1 tsp shredded coconut.
